zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Crophull於大約1371年出生在英國賀福爾時，她的父親Thomas de Crophull37歲，母親Sibilla de La Bere34歲。她於1383年與Walter Devereux結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1436年2月3日在英國賀福爾金納斯利享年66歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾維奧布利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Crophull于大约1371年出生在英国賀福爾时，她的父亲Thomas de Crophull37岁，母亲Sibilla de La Bere34岁。她于1383年与Walter Devereux结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1436年2月3日在英国賀福爾金納斯利享年66岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾維奧布利。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Crophull was born about 1371, in Herefordshire, England, her father, Thomas de Crophull, was 37 and her mother, Sibilla de La Bere, was 34. She married Walter Devereux in 1383. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 3 February 1436, in Kinnersley, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Weobley, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Crophull est née environ 1371, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Crophull, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Sibilla de La Bere, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Devereux en 1383. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 février 1436, à Kinnersley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Weobley, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Crophull um 1371 in Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Crophull 37 und ihre Mutter Sibilla de La Bere 34. Sie hat 1383 Walter Devereux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Februar 1436 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Kinnersley, Herefordshire, England und wurde in Weobley, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Crophull è nata il circa 1371 nel Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Thomas de Crophull, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Sibilla de La Bere, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Walter Devereux nel 1383. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 febbraio 1436, nel Kinnersley, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Weobley, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Crophullが約1371年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas de Crophullは37歳，母Sibilla de La Bereは34歳であった。1383年にWalter Devereuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1436年2月3日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアキネルスリーで66歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウエオブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Crophull(이)가 대략 1371년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Crophull(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibilla de La Bere(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1383년 Walter Devereux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1436년 2월 3일 영국 허퍼드실르 킨르슬리에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 베오블리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Crophull nasceu aproximadamente 1371, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Crophull, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Sibilla de La Bere, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter Devereux em 1383. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de fevereiro de 1436, em Kinnersley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Crophull родилась около 1371 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Crophull было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibilla de La Bere, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Devereux в 1383 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 3 февраля 1436 г. в местности киннирсли, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности веобли, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Crophull nació aproximadamente 1371, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Crophull, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Sibilla de La Bere, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Walter Devereux en 1383. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de febrero de 1436, en Kinnersley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
